title: lobelia dunnii
intro: Lobelia dunnii, also known as California lobelia or Dunn's lobelia, is a perennial flowering plant native to California in the United States. It is a member of the Campanulaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its antiseptic properties make it effective against wounds and skin infections. Lobelia dunnii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, anxiety, and other health conditions.
